psalm-91-1.verse:
He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High
  Will abide in the shadow of the Almighty.
psalm-91-1.prayer: Lord, help me dwell in the shelter of the Most High and rest securely in Your presence.

psalm-91-2.verse:
I will say to the Lord, “My refuge and my fortress,
  My God, in whom I trust!”
psalm-91-2.prayer: Father, You are my refuge and fortress. Teach me to trust You with all my heart.

psalm-91-3.verse:
For it is He who delivers you from the snare of the trapper
  And from the deadly pestilence.
psalm-91-3.prayer: Lord, deliver me from hidden traps, fear, and anything that seeks to harm my soul.

psalm-91-4.prayer: Father, cover me with Your protection and let me find refuge under Your wings.

psalm-91-5.verse:
You will not be afraid of the terror by night,
  Or of the arrow that flies by day;
psalm-91-5.prayer: Lord, keep me from fear in the night and from anxiety during the day.

psalm-91-6.verse:
Of the pestilence that stalks in darkness,
  Or of the destruction that lays waste at noon.
psalm-91-6.prayer: Father, protect my heart from unseen dangers and help me rest in Your care.

psalm-91-7.verse:
A thousand may fall at your side
  And ten thousand at your right hand,
  But it shall not approach you.
psalm-91-7.prayer: Lord, when trouble surrounds me, help me remain confident in Your protection.

psalm-91-8.verse:
You will only look on with your eyes
  And see the recompense of the wicked.
psalm-91-8.prayer: Father, help me trust Your justice and remember that You see all things clearly.

psalm-91-9.verse:
For you have made the Lord, my refuge,
  Even the Most High, your dwelling place.
psalm-91-9.prayer: Lord, because You are my refuge, help me make Your presence my dwelling place.

psalm-91-10.verse:
No evil will befall you,
  Nor will any plague come near your tent.
psalm-91-10.prayer: Father, guard my life and protect me from harm according to Your will.

psalm-91-11.verse:
For He will give His angels charge concerning you,
  To guard you in all your ways.
psalm-91-11.prayer: Lord, thank You for commanding Your angels concerning Your people. Keep me in Your care.

psalm-91-12.verse:
They will bear you up in their hands,
  That you do not strike your foot against a stone.
psalm-91-12.prayer: Father, guide my steps and protect me from stumbling as I walk with You.

psalm-91-13.verse:
You will tread upon the lion and cobra,
  The young lion and the serpent you will trample down.
psalm-91-13.prayer: Lord, give me courage to overcome fear, temptation, and every spiritual threat through Your strength.

psalm-91-14.verse:
“Because he has loved Me, therefore I will deliver him;
  I will set him securely on high, because he has known My name.
psalm-91-14.prayer: Father, help me cling to You in love and trust. Thank You for knowing my name and delivering me.

psalm-91-15.prayer: Lord, when I call upon You, thank You for answering me and being with me in trouble.

psalm-91-16.verse:
With a long life I will satisfy him
  And let him see My salvation.”
psalm-91-16.prayer: Father, satisfy me with the fullness of life found in You and let me see Your salvation.

psalm-91-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my refuge, fortress, shelter, and deliverer. Help me dwell in Your presence, trust Your protection, and call upon You with confidence. Guard my steps, quiet my fears, and strengthen my heart in every season. May my life rest securely under Your wings and rejoice in the salvation You provide.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
